name: Snort
author: Simon Norton / AGP
description: Snort (Simon Norton) — a combinatorial game on a square grid, the exact dual of Col. On your turn you colour one empty cell with YOUR colour, but never on a cell orthogonally adjacent to a cell holding the OPPONENT's colour (adjacency to your own colour is allowed; diagonals are unrestricted). Normal play: the player with no legal move loses (last to move wins). It is sometimes described as 'misère Col', though it is the dual rather than the misère version.
